name: SingleCrystalOrientation
description: Crystallographic orientation angle in degrees (0-360) specifying the angular position of a single crystal relative to a reference axis.
ExpectedUse: Specification of crystal orientations in single crystal samples for X-ray diffraction, electron backscatter diffraction (EBSD), mechanical testing along specific crystallographic directions, and anisotropy studies.

Properties.Name: SingleCrystalOrientation
